DatasetTitle: ECONOMIC ACTIVITY BY RELIGION BY AGE BY SEX
Annotations: 1. ‘Religion’ indicates religion, religious denomination or body.; 2. 'Catholic' includes those who gave their current religion as Catholic or Roman Catholic.; 3. 'Part-time' is defined as working 30 hours or less per week. 'Full-time' is defined as working 31 or more hours per week.; 4. 'Unemployed' excludes full-time students.; 5. 'Age' is age at last birthday.;
